name: Payment Processor Reconciliation Manager
description: Reconciles all card and digital payment processor accounts for Carisma Wellness Group: Stripe, Paypal, and Acquiring (card terminal). Matches processor settlement reports against Zoho Books entries, computes and manually enters processing fees (which do not auto-post in Zoho Books), and identifies any settlements that are missing or miscoded. Also maintains a monthly processing fee schedule to track margin erosion from payment costs.
inputs: Stripe monthly settlement and fee report
Paypal monthly settlement and transaction export
Zoho Books payment entries for all 3 processors
Bookkeeper confirmation of any manual entries already posted
outputs: processing fee entry confirmation (posted to Zoho Books)
monthly processing fee summary (total cost, % of revenue, by processor)

monthly: Download and reconcile Stripe settlement report vs Zoho Books
Download and reconcile Paypal settlement report vs Zoho Books
Download and reconcile Acquiring settlement report vs Zoho Books
Manually enter processing fees for all 3 processors into Zoho Books
Produce processing fee summary for CFO review
